title: EPIC: QA Framework & Hooks
body:
Parent label for all QA framework tasks.

**Scope**: QA mode, metrics, GPU timings, accessibility IDs.

Link child issues via checklist in this epic after creation.

title: Add QA Mode & Metrics Hooks
body:
Implement `QAHooks.swift` to collect FPS, GPU timings, and memory usage in QA mode.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Add `QALaunch`, `QAMetrics`, `QAMemory` structures
- [ ] Integrate into render loop (`tick(commandBuffer:)`)
- [ ] Export JSON metrics via `Export_QA` button
- [ ] JSON contains `fps`, `gpu_ms_p50/p95`, `mem_samples`

**DoD**: Launch with `-QA`, export file appears in tmp with required fields.

title: Add Accessibility Identifiers for QA UI
body:
Set `accessibilityIdentifier` for UI elements used by XCUITests.

**IDs**: `Settings`, `Preset_Low/Medium/High/Cinematic`, `Distance_Near/Far`, `Export_QA`, `QA_SampleMemory`, `QA_ExportStability`.

**DoD**: XCUITests can tap each element reliably.

title: Separate Command Buffers per Pass (GPU timings)
body:
Ensure GPU timings are valid by isolating render passes or marking boundaries.

**Checklist**
- [ ] One `MTLCommandBuffer` per pass OR clear boundaries
- [ ] Collect timings via `addCompletedHandler`
- [ ] p50/p95 GPU timings vary with preset

**DoD**: Stable, reproducible per-pass timings.

title: EPIC: Visual Validation
body: Parent label for visual validation tasks.

title: Create QA Repo Structure
body:
Prepare folders for QA artifacts.

**Checklist**
- [ ] `QA/refs/`, `QA/reports/visual/`, `QA/tools/`
- [ ] Add `.gitkeep`

**DoD**: Folders exist and are tracked.

title: Collect Reference Images
body:
Capture baseline PNGs for Low/Medium/High/Cinematic × Near/Far.

**Checklist**
- [ ] 8 screenshots saved as `Preset_Distance.png` in `QA/refs/`
- [ ] Manual sanity check

**DoD**: References ready and committed.

title: Implement ImageComparator Utility
body:
Add `QA/tools/ImageComparator.swift` to compare screenshots.

**Outputs**: `diff.png`, `annotated.png`, `visual_report.json`.

**Metrics**: brightness delta, corona radial profile, granulation.

**DoD**: Running comparator yields artifacts and metrics.

title: Add VisualValidationTests (XCUITest)
body:
Automate capture & comparison vs references for Near/Far.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Launch with `-QA`
- [ ] Set preset/distance, screenshot
- [ ] Compare via `ImageComparator`
- [ ] Attach diffs to test report

**DoD**: Test fails when delta exceeds threshold.

title: EPIC: Performance Matrix
body: Parent label for performance matrix tasks.

title: Implement Export Metrics Button
body:
Add `Export_QA` button to dump `qa_metrics.json` to tmp.

**Fields**: `fps`, `gpu_ms_p50`, `gpu_ms_p95`, `mem_samples`.

**DoD**: File appears and validates JSON schema.

title: Add PerformanceMatrixTests (XCUITest)
body:
Benchmark FPS/GPU across Preset×Distance and aggregate CSV.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Iterate Low/Medium/High/Cinematic × Near/Far
- [ ] Wait for stabilization
- [ ] Trigger `Export_QA`
- [ ] Build `PerfMatrix.csv` under `QA/reports/perf/`

**DoD**: CSV attached as test artifact.

title: Implement Perf Plot Tool
body:
Script `QA/tools/plot_perf.py` to render graphs from `PerfMatrix.csv`.

**Output**: PNG graphs (FPS vs Preset).

**DoD**: PNG plots generated and uploaded as CI artifacts.

title: EPIC: Stability & Stress
body: Parent label for long-run stability tasks.

title: Add Memory Sampling Hook
body:
Wire `QA_SampleMemory` to `QAMetrics.sampleMemory()` and export via `QA_ExportStability`.

**DoD**: Memory timeline exported (JSON/CSV).

title: Add StabilityStressTests (30-min)
body:
Automate 30-min run with rapid preset/distance switches and memory sampling.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Loop 30 min switching presets
- [ ] Sample memory every ~10s
- [ ] Export stability report at end

**DoD**: 0 crashes; artifacts exported.

title: EPIC: Device Coverage & CI
body: Parent label for device/CI tasks.

title: Add Device Info in Metrics
body:
Include `device_model` and `os_version` in exported JSON/CSV.

**DoD**: Present in `PerfMatrix.csv` and QA JSON.

title: Setup CI Jobs for QA Tests
body:
Configure `xcodebuild` runs on devices; collect artifacts.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Run Visual/Perf/Stability suites
- [ ] Upload CSV/JSON/PNGs as artifacts
- [ ] Fail build if QA tests fail

**DoD**: Stable CI pipeline with artifacts.

title: Aggregate Multi-Device CSV
body:
Merge per-device CSVs into a single `PerfMatrix.csv` adding device columns.

**DoD**: Unified CSV produced and archived.

title: EPIC: Thresholds & Docs
body: Parent label for thresholds and documentation.

title: Add QA Thresholds Config
body:
Create `QA/qa_thresholds.json` (visual, FPS, GPU p95, memory drift). Code reads at runtime.

**DoD**: Changing thresholds doesn’t require rebuild.

title: Add QA README
body:
Document QA setup, commands, artifacts, and metrics.

**DoD**: New contributor can run all QA flows via README.

title: EPIC: Polishing
body: Parent label for stability/quality improvements.

title: Add Flaky-Guard for Visual Tests
body:
Reduce flakiness by waiting FPS stabilization and using deterministic seeds in QA mode.

**DoD**: Re-runs produce stable diffs.

title: Add Error Budget Alerts
body:
Fail early on large regressions (fps drop %, visual delta %). Add detailed metrics to failure message.

**DoD**: Regression caught in same pipeline.
